email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Digital Experience Manager bij Timefold. Uw oproep voor een hands-on rol die website, social media en CRO combineert, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

Bij Episto beheer ik on-page SEO, bouw en onderhoud ik WordPress-sites (Elementor, Astra) en schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content. Ik ben vertrouwd met Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush en Ahrefs. Op mijn eigen project mirook.com pas ik gestructureerde data (JSON-LD) en GEO toe om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Daarnaast heb ik ervaring met social media coördinatie.

Ik werk gestructureerd, los problemen snel op en communiceer helder met ontwikkelaars en designers. Mijn technische achtergrond helpt me om website-issues te triagen en conversiepaden te optimaliseren.

Ik spreek Engels (vloeiend) en Nederlands (B1, in opleiding). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Gent, en ben klaar om bij te dragen aan Timefold's groei.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Digital Experience Manager position at Timefold. Your call for a hands-on role combining website, social media, and CRO aligns perfectly with my experience.

At Episto, I manage on-page SEO, build and maintain WordPress sites (Elementor, Astra), and write keyword-targeted content. I am familiar with Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs. On my own project mirook.com, I apply structured data (JSON-LD) and GEO to improve visibility in AI-powered search engines. I also have experience with social media coordination.

I work in a structured way, solve problems quickly, and communicate clearly with developers and designers. My technical background helps me triage website issues and optimize conversion paths.

I speak English (fluent) and Dutch (B1, currently studying). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Ghent, and am ready to contribute to Timefold's growth.

I would be happy to discuss my motivation in an interview.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer/mevrouw,

Toen ik de vacature voor Digital Experience Manager bij Timefold las, voelde ik direct een sterke klik. U zoekt iemand die eigenaarschap neemt over de website, sociale media en conversie-optimalisatie — precies de combinatie van vaardigheden die ik de afgelopen jaren heb opgebouwd.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites (Elementor, Astra) en het schrijven van SEO-content. Ik werk dagelijks met Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush en Ahrefs om prestaties te monitoren en te verbeteren. Daarnaast coördineer ik social media-integratie en zorg ik voor consistente berichtgeving.

Op mijn eigen project mirook.com pas ik geavanceerde technieken toe zoals gestructureerde data (JSON-LD) en Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te vergroten. Dit sluit naadloos aan bij Timefold's focus op technische doelgroepen en AI-gedreven optimalisatie.

Wat mij aanspreekt in deze rol is de hands-on verantwoordelijkheid: van het triagen van website-problemen en het beheren van de contentkalender tot het uitvoeren van A/B-testen en het optimaliseren van conversiepaden. Mijn technische achtergrond (front-end ervaring met AngularJS) stelt me in staat om effectief te communiceren met ontwikkelaars en externe partners.

Ik werk gestructureerd, plan vooruit en communiceer proactief over prioriteiten — precies wat nodig is om een live website-roadmap te beheren en verrassingen te voorkomen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met wekelijkse lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, op fietsafstand van Gent, en ben flexibel voor hybride werken.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie en ervaring in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

When I read the vacancy for Digital Experience Manager at Timefold, I felt an immediate connection. You are looking for someone who takes ownership of the website, social media, and conversion optimization — exactly the combination of skills I have built over the past years.

At Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, building and maintaining WordPress sites (Elementor, Astra), and writing SEO content. I work daily with Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs to monitor and improve performance. I also coordinate social media integration and ensure consistent messaging.

On my own project mirook.com, I apply advanced techniques such as structured data (JSON-LD) and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) to increase visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This aligns perfectly with Timefold's focus on technical audiences and AI-driven optimization.

What appeals to me in this role is the hands-on responsibility: from triaging website issues and managing the content calendar to running A/B tests and optimizing conversion paths. My technical background (front-end experience with AngularJS) enables me to communicate effectively with developers and external partners.

I work in a structured way, plan ahead, and communicate proactively about priorities — exactly what is needed to manage a live website roadmap and avoid surprises.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with weekly lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, cycling distance from Ghent, and am flexible for hybrid work.

I hope to further explain my motivation and experience in a personal conversation.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Hands-on website ownership: built and maintained WordPress sites (Elementor, Astra) with full-cycle content management, SEO, and performance tracking.
- SEO & GEO expertise: applied structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, and GEO to improve visibility in traditional and AI-powered search engines.
- Social media coordination: integrated social media (Instagram/Facebook) into website projects and managed content calendars.
- Analytics-driven: daily use of Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs to monitor traffic, conversions, and optimize performance.
- Technical foundation: front-end development experience (AngularJS, JavaScript) enabling effective communication with developers and troubleshooting website issues.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
